overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character walking along a mountainous ridge in a desolate, atmospheric landscape. The character traverses rocky terrain as the camera reveals dramatic cliff edges and distant snow-capped peaks through heavy haze.

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily along rocky mountain terrain toward a ridge line

entered.detail: barren rocky ground with brown and grey tones forming the walking path
distant mountain peak with visible snow patches shrouded in atmospheric haze
large vertical rock formation rising on the right side of the path
overcast grey sky blending with misty mountain atmosphere

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a barren mountain ridge with rocky terrain underfoot. Snow-capped peaks are visible in the hazy distance while a large cliff face looms on the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliff edge path with canyon view

events.description: steep canyon drop-off becomes visible on the left as the character rounds the ridge

agents.ego_description: character continuing along the narrow ridge path with canyon drop visible to the left

entered.detail: sheer cliff edge dropping into a deep misty canyon with layered rock formations

segments.scene_description: As the character progresses along the ridge, a dramatic steep canyon drop-off is revealed on the left side. The path continues along the cliff edge with the rocky cliff face now closer on the right and the misty canyon falling away to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a desolate mountain ridge that evolves from a barren plateau into a precarious cliffside traversal. It begins with the character walking across rocky terrain, with distant snow-capped peaks shimmering through a heavy haze and a massive cliff face looming to the right. As the character progresses, the perspective shifts to reveal a dramatic, steep canyon drop-off opening up on the left side of the frame. The scene then tightens as the path clings to the narrow edge, bringing the rocky cliff face closer on the right while the misty depths of the canyon fall away into the void.
